name: Condor Resources Inc.
summary: Condor Resources Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Peru. It explores for gold, and other precious and base metals, as well as silver, copper, lead, and zinc deposits. The company's portfolio includes various projects, such as Chavin, Soledad, Quriurqu, Hui√É¬±ac Punta, Ocros, Pucamayo, Humaya, Andrea, San Martin, Lucero, Quilisane, and Cobreorco. Condor Resources Inc. was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
